caption: A man sits in a podcast studio, wearing a black baseball cap with a logo, a black t-shirt that says "CHECK IT," and over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and looks slightly to his left while speaking. Behind him is a white wall featuring a logo with the word "HUSTLE" and several gold stars. To his right, a partial view of a screen or sign displays the text "BOSS TALK 101." Two graphic overlays appear on the screen: one on the left featuring a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another on the right with the text "BOSS TALK 101." Across the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, with subtle shifts in his facial expression and head posture as he continues to talk, while the setting and on-screen graphics remain static.
